scenarios.title: [EWT-1] - Check that the landscape image loads with the correct src
scenarios.userAction: Navigate to the loading-images demo page and wait for the lazy-loaded landscape image to appear in the DOM, then verify its src attribute contains 'landscape'.
expectedAssertions: landscape image (#landscape) is attached to the DOM within 10 000 ms of page load
landscape image src attribute matches /landscape/i after lazy-load completes

locatorTable.notes: Mechanical By.id → CSS id mapping per KB hallucination rule. No DOM evidence for alt attribute; if reviewer confirms alt='Landscape' on the img element, upgrade to page.getByAltText(/landscape/i) for higher selector quality.
